name: NFPA 101 Life Safety Code 2024

rules.label: Building Rehabilitation – Updated Provisions
rules.notes_template: Apply Chapter 43 rehabilitation work category (Repair, Renovation, Modification, Reconstruction, Change of Use/Occupancy, Addition) to existing buildings.
rules.citation: NFPA 101 2024 §43 – Rehabilitation work categories and corresponding requirements.
rules.remediation: Classify the rehab project per §43.2 and apply the corresponding subsection.
